This is a known paraneoplastic syndrome associated with sarcomas, leading to hypoglycemia.
So, the most likely diagnosis here is hypoglycemia due to a paraneoplastic syndrome from his spindle-cell sarcoma.
The tumor is producing IGF, which is causing the low blood sugar levels.
